evidenceItem.testimony: Vivian 此刻手里正拿着一把手枪，她一定是刚刚杀了 Webb。

words: Vivian 此刻手里正拿着一把手枪，她一定是刚刚杀了 Webb。

evidenceItem.testimony: 23:30 枪响，当晚无其他枪响，当时只有 Vivian 在里面，所以只能是她杀的。

words: 23:30 枪响，当晚并没有其他枪响，当时只有 Vivian 在里面，所以只能是她杀的。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的清洁工。

words: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的清洁工。

evidenceItem.testimony: 23:20 我去外面丢过一次垃圾。

words: 23:20 我去外面丢过一次垃圾，真的就一次。

evidenceItem.testimony: 大家都听到了 23:30 的枪响，没有其他枪响，当时只有 Vivian 在场，一定是她杀的。

words: 大家都听到了 23:30 的枪响，没有其他枪响，当时只有 Vivian 在场——一定是她杀的。

evidenceItem.testimony: Webb 已经死亡，Vivian 为主要嫌疑人。

words: Webb 已经死亡，Vivian 为主要嫌疑人。

evidenceItem.testimony: 准备逮捕 Vivian。

words: 准备逮捕 Vivian。

evidenceItem.testimony: 因 Zack 揭穿 Rosa 部分谎言 + 委托协议书，同意给 72 小时；要求 Vivian 禁足。

words: 鉴于你揭穿了 Rosa 的部分谎言，加上 Webb 生前签过的委托协议书——给你 72 小时。但 Vivian 不许离开酒吧。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是警察侦探。

words: 我是警察侦探。

evidenceItem.testimony: 搜查了整个酒吧，确认现场子弹弹壳缺失，没有发现其他枪支。

words: 我搜查了整个酒吧，现场弹壳缺失，也没有发现其他枪支。

evidenceItem.testimony: 子弹射穿了 Webb 后击中了窗户。

words: 子弹射穿了 Webb 后击中了窗户。

evidenceItem.testimony: Vivian 有杀人动机和计划，她的手枪就是真正的凶器。

words: Vivian 有杀人动机和计划，她的手枪就是真正的凶器。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我要拿走 Webb 的委托协议书，宣布逮捕 Vivian。

words: 我要拿走 Webb 的委托协议书，并宣布逮捕 Vivian。

evidenceItem.testimony: Vivian 的手枪就是凶器，凶手就是 Vivian！

words: Vivian 的手枪就是凶器，凶手就是 Vivian！

evidenceItem.testimony: 我只是临时接警，搜查有失误——后续可以重新调查，不需要现在就释放嫌疑人。

words: 我只是临时接警，搜查有失误——后续完全可以重新调查，不需要现在就释放嫌疑人。

evidenceItem.testimony: 就算我和 Whale 之间有借贷关系，Whale 只是个放贷的——和 Webb、Jimmy 的死无关，那是私人交易。

words: 就算我和 Whale 之间有借贷关系，Whale 只是个放贷的——和 Webb、Jimmy 的死无关，那是私人交易。

evidenceItem.testimony: 酒吧里都是正当生意，除了私酒没有别的交易。

words: 酒吧里都是正当生意，除了私酒之外没有别的交易。

evidenceItem.testimony: Vivian 的排班表——她每晚 23:30 给 Webb 送酒。

words: Vivian 的排班表——她每晚最后一项任务是 23:30 给 Webb 送酒。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的经理。

words: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的经理。

evidenceItem.testimony: Rita 也是 Whale 派来的间谍——她问的问题太精准、来的时机太巧。

words: Rita 也是 Whale 派来的间谍——我在 Webb 身边多年，她问的问题太精准、来的时机太巧。

evidenceItem.testimony: 这个酒吧里知道 Whale 的，除了 Webb，只有前勒索人和现勒索人。

words: 这家酒吧里知道 Whale 的，除了 Webb，只有前勒索人和现勒索人。

evidenceItem.testimony: 知道 Whale 存在的，在这家酒吧只有前勒索人和现勒索人。

words: 知道 Whale 存在的，在这家酒吧，只有前勒索人和现勒索人。

evidenceItem.testimony: 对 Morrison 强押 Vivian 表示同情——希望你能查明真相，还 Vivian 清白。

words: Vivian 是冤枉的。我希望你能查明真相，还她清白。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的歌女。

words: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的歌女。

evidenceItem.testimony: 因为 Webb 一直让我去勒索别人，我恨他。

words: 因为 Webb 一直让我去勒索别人，我恨他。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我平时都会在 23:30 给 Webb 送酒。

words: 我每晚都是 23:30 去给 Webb 送酒——那是惯例。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我真的杀了 Webb！

words: 我真的杀了 Webb！

evidenceItem.testimony: 23:05 我准备去找 Webb，但在门口听到'Don't be bothering me!'，于是退走；23:30 才按送酒时间回去。

words: 23:05 我准备去找 Webb，但在门口听到'Don't be bothering me!'——于是我退走了。23:30 才按送酒时间回去。

evidenceItem.testimony: 《芝加哥狂想曲》的鼓点很强，是 Webb 最喜欢的一首曲子；当晚我希望他能听到和我最后共舞一曲。

words: 《芝加哥狂想曲》的鼓点很强，是 Webb 最喜欢的一首曲子。当晚我希望他能听到，跟我最后共舞一曲。

evidenceItem.testimony: Webb 利用我勒索的都是孤立的银行家、工程师等中产阶级；我之前并不知道 Whale 是谁。

words: Webb 利用我勒索的都是孤立的银行家、工程师这些中产——我之前并不知道 Whale 是谁。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我仍然坚持——我就是凶手。

words: 我仍然坚持——我就是凶手。

evidenceItem.testimony: Webb 利用我勒索的都是孤立的中产；帮 Webb 勒索 Whale 的人不是我。

words: Webb 利用我勒索的都是孤立的中产阶级——银行家、工程师。帮 Webb 勒索 Whale 的人不是我。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我在 23:05 准备去杀 Webb，在门口听到'Don't be bothering me!'就退走了；越来越觉得不对劲，23:30 才回去推开了门。

words: 23:05 我准备去杀 Webb，走到门口听到里面吼一句'Don't be bothering me!'就退走了。越想越不对劲，23:30 才回去推开了门。

evidenceItem.testimony: 被带走时，我感觉枪声是从头顶方向传来的（23:30 那声枪响）。

words: 被带走的时候，我感觉那声枪响是从头顶方向传来的。

evidenceItem.testimony: 保险箱的密码是那一天——我们在那家咖啡馆，Webb 说他要记住这个日期；他一直记着。

words: 保险箱的密码是那一天——我们在那家咖啡馆，Webb 说他要记住这个日期。他一直记着。

evidenceItem.testimony: 他把这些碎片交给我，说如果他出了事，就交给真正能用到它的人——他知道自己会死。

words: 他把这些碎片交给我，说如果他出了事，就交给真正能用到它的人。他知道自己会死。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我很缺钱，最近家里不容易。

words: 唉，最近真是很缺钱，家里不容易。

evidenceItem.testimony: Vivian 杀 Webb 情有可原——我们都挺惨的。

words: Vivian 杀 Webb 的事，情有可原——我们这种人过得都挺惨的。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的主厨。

words: 我是蓝月亮酒吧的主厨。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我只是一个主厨，不了解勒索相关的事。销毁节目单是因为印错了，不能用。

words: 我只是一个主厨，不了解勒索这些事。销毁节目单？那是因为印错了，不能用。

evidenceItem.testimony: Don't be bothering me!（爱尔兰裔 Hiberno-English 特有句式，对厨房事故的反射性咒骂）

words: Don't be bothering me!

evidenceItem.testimony: 我当天有不在场证明，枪声发生在 23:30，不可能有其他时间能杀人，如果有枪声大家都能听到。

words: 我当天有不在场证明——枪声是 23:30，没有其他时间能杀人。如果有别的枪声，大家都能听到。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我们的孩子快出生了，家里需要一大笔钱——医院不便宜，爱尔兰人在这座城市不容易。

words: 我们的孩子快出生了，家里需要一大笔钱——医院不便宜，爱尔兰人在这座城市不容易。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我是 Jimmy 的妻子。

words: 我是 Jimmy 的妻子。

evidenceItem.testimony: 他说……'Anna，照顾好她……'——那是他最后说的话；不是说爱我，但我知道他的意思。

words: 他说……'Anna，照顾好她……'——那是他最后说的话。不是说爱我，但我知道他的意思。

evidenceItem.testimony: 我在看你们能走多远。

words: 我在看你们能走多远。
你是谁？今晚在哪？看到什么了吗？
Who are you? Where were you tonight? Did you see anything?
我是<special=1>蓝月亮的清洁工</special>，<special=2>9点半起在地下室走廊打扫</special>。地下室隔音好，什么都没听到。
I'm a <special=1>cleaner at Blue Moon</special>, <special=2>been cleaning the basement corridor since nine-thirty</special>. Good soundproofing down there, didn't hear anything.

testimony: Rosa是蓝月亮的清洁工
Rosa is a cleaner at Blue Moon
Rosa从9点半开始在地下室走廊打扫
Rosa has been cleaning in the basement corridor since 9:30

words: 你还知道些什么？
What else do you know?
我不能说...<special=1>他们会杀了我的</special>。去会客室附近看看吧。
I can't say... <special=1>they'll kill me</special>. Check around the parlor.

testimony: Rosa暗示有人威胁她
Rosa implies someone is threatening her

words: Morrison那天做了什么？
What did Morrison do that night?
看到Morrison把你拖进会客室后，<special=1>大约12点半我躲进了储藏室</special>，一直躲着什么都不敢看。
After seeing Morrison drag you into the parlor, <special=1>around half past twelve I hid in the storage room</special>, hid the whole time, didn't dare look.

testimony: Rosa大约12点半躲进了储藏室
Rosa hid in the storage room around half past twelve

words: 你后来看到Morrison在现场做了什么？
What did you see Morrison do at the scene afterwards?
后来Morrison叫来了其他警察，我站在门口看。他在房间里走来走去，蹲下看了看，但没碰任何东西。
Later Morrison called other police. I watched from the door. He walked around the room, squatted to look, but didn't touch anything.
从他到达到离开——他用过任何工具吗？尺子、相机、手套？
From arrival to departure—did he use any tools? Rulers, cameras, gloves?
没有，<special=1>Morrison空着手进去，空着手出来</special>，我看得很清楚。
No, <special=1>Morrison went in empty-handed and came out empty-handed</special>, I saw it clearly.

testimony: Morrison空着手进出现场，没使用任何工具
Morrison went in and out of the scene empty-handed, without any tools

words: 他早就知道现场是什么样的。因为是他布置的。
He already knew what the scene looked like. Because he staged it.
是...是的...他之前就已经...
Yes... yes... he had already before...
你女儿怎么样了？
How is your daughter?
好多了，药很管用。谢谢您，Brennan先生。
Much better, the medicine works well. Thank you, Mr. Brennan.
你知道Webb的勒索生意吗？
Do you know about Webb's extortion business?
什...什么？我不知道！我只是个清洁工，什么都不知道！
Wh... what? I don't know! I'm just a cleaner, I don't know anything!
Jimmy最近有什么异常？
Has Jimmy been acting strangely lately?
5、6天前我在走廊擦墙，看见<special=1>Jimmy带了一个人进了Webb先生的会客室</special>，不是办公室！那里没什么值钱的，重要东西都在办公室。

Five or six days ago I was cleaning the hallway wall, and I saw <special=1>Jimmy taking someone into Mr. Webb's parlor</special>, not the office! There's nothing valuable there, the important stuff is all in the office.

testimony: Rosa看到Jimmy带人进入Webb的会客室而非办公室
Rosa saw Jimmy take someone into Webb's parlor, not his office

words: 那个人什么样？待了多久？
What did that person look like? How long were they inside?
2、3分钟就出来了，穿得很板正但面色阴沉。看到我挤出个很僵的笑就匆匆走了，之后没再见过。
Came out in 2-3 minutes, dressed formally but looking gloomy. Saw me, forced a stiff smile and rushed off. Never saw that again.
Vivian最近怎么样？案发那晚有什么异常？
How has Vivian been lately? Anything unusual the night of the incident?
案发那晚大约<special=1>11点，我看见Vivian紧张地拿着小包快步走向会客室</special>。她看到我就把包藏起来，头也不回就进去了。
The night of the incident, around <special=1>11pm, I saw Vivian nervously carrying a small bag toward the parlor</special>. She hid the bag when she saw me and rushed inside without looking back.

testimony: 案发当晚约23:00，Rosa看到Vivian紧张地携带小包走向会客室
On the night of the incident around 11pm, Rosa saw Vivian nervously carrying a small bag toward the parlor

words: 你还有什么想说的？
Is there anything else you want to say?
女儿需要手术，药很贵，我必须保住这份工作。Morrison威胁过要让我失业...那些人很危险。
My daughter needs surgery, medicine is expensive, I must keep this job. Morrison threatened to fire me... those people are dangerous.
Morrison？你在这做什么？
Morrison? What are you doing here?
在等警员封锁现场。又见面了，私家侦探。
Waiting for officers to seal the scene. We meet again, private eye.
规矩我懂，但真相似乎还没查清。
I know rules. But truth isn't clear yet.
这里是封锁区域，离会客室远点。别逼我再铐你。
This is a sealed area, stay away from the parlor. Don't make me cuff you again.
这种大案通常由刑侦科接手，你一个巡警凭什么充当指挥官？
Homicide usually goes to Criminal Investigation. What authority does a beat cop have to act as commander?
我是这片街区的治安负责人，<special=1>蓝月亮属于我的管辖范围</special>。在我把案子移交之前，这里我说了算。
I'm the officer in charge of this beat, <special=1>Blue Moon is under my jurisdiction</special>. Until I hand it over, what I say goes.

testimony: Morrison自称蓝月亮属于他的管辖范围
Morrison claims Blue Moon is under his jurisdiction

words: 我前脚刚发现尸体，你后脚就到了。简直就像你就在门口等着一样。
I find the body and you appear instantly. Like you were waiting at the door.
<special=1>11点半在家接到匿名线报，立刻赶往现场</special>。
<special=1>Received an anonymous tip at 11:30 PM at home and rushed to the scene immediately</special>.

testimony: Morrison称自己11点半接到匿名线报之后立刻赶往现场
Morrison claims he immediately rushed to the scene after receiving an anonymous tip at 11:30 PM

words: 你的辖区，Webb的酒吧，你们没少打交道吧？
Your jurisdiction, Webb's bar. You must have dealt with each other a lot?
<special=1>我和Webb仅限于公事公办</special>，他的生意细节我从不过问。
<special=1>My relationship with Webb was strictly business</special>, I never asked about his dealings.

testimony: Morrison声称与Webb仅限于公事公办的工作关系
Morrison claims his relationship with Webb was strictly business

words: 你是谁？做什么工作的？Webb是什么人？
Who are you? What do you do? Who was Webb?
我是Tommy，<special=1>蓝月亮的酒吧经理</special>，负责收账排班。Webb做事有手段，但我只管账目。
I'm Tommy, <special=1>bar manager at Blue Moon</special>, handling payments and scheduling. Webb had his ways, but I only handle the books.

testimony: Tommy是蓝月亮的酒吧经理
Tommy is the bar manager at Blue Moon

words: 今晚你在哪儿？
Where were you tonight?
<special=1>晚上10点起在办公室整理账本</special>，一直没离开。账本和楼下酒保可以证明。
Been <special=1>organizing ledgers in the office since ten PM</special>, never left. The ledgers and bartenders downstairs can confirm.

testimony: Tommy从晚上10点开始在办公室整理账本
Tommy has been organizing ledgers in the office since 10 PM

words: 昨晚有什么异常？
Anything unusual last night?
<special=1>11点30分听到一声枪响</special>，只有一声，非常干脆。
Heard <special=1>a single gunshot at 11:30 PM</special>, just one, very clean.

testimony: Tommy在11点30分听到一声枪响
Tommy heard a gunshot at 11:30 PM

words: 关于Morrison，你了解他吗？
About Morrison. What do you know about him?
Morrison是警察，有权力。Webb已经死了，我没选择。我只管账目，其他的不关我的事。
Morrison is police, has power. Webb is dead, I have no choice. I just handle the accounts, the rest isn't my business.
你和Morrison打过交道吗？去他家干嘛？
Have you dealt with Morrison? Why go to his place?
<special=1>去过Morrison家几次送东西</special>，这一行给警察打点是常事。
<special=1>Been to Morrison's place a few times to deliver things</special>, greasing cops is normal in this business.

testimony: Tommy曾去Morrison家给他送东西
Tommy has been to Morrison's house to deliver things

words: Morrison家到这里多远？
How far is Morrison's place from here?
<special=1>从Morrison家到蓝月亮开车最多15分钟</special>，我送过东西，记得很清楚。
<special=1>Fifteen minutes at most driving from Morrison's place to Blue Moon</special>, I've made deliveries, remember clearly.

testimony: 从Morrison家到蓝月亮酒吧开车最多15分钟
It takes at most fifteen minutes to drive from Morrison's house to Blue Moon

words: 如果Morrison问起，就说我只问了距离。你也小心，Morrison不好惹。
If Morrison asks, say I only asked about distance. Be careful too, Morrison isn't one to mess with.
谢谢...谢谢您，Brennan先生...
Thank you... thank you, Mr. Brennan...
Webb最近有什么异常？
Anything unusual with Webb lately?
不太清楚，Webb先生很少和我说那些事，我只管账目。
Not really sure, Mr. Webb rarely told me about those things, I just handle the accounts.
Webb做什么生意？
What business was Webb in?
<special=1>只有私酒生意，从加拿大进货卖给本地客户，没有其他业务</special>。
<special=1>Only bootlegging—imported from Canada, sold to local clients, no other business</special>.

testimony: Tommy声称Webb只做私酒生意，没有其他业务
Tommy claims Webb only dealt in bootlegging, no other business

words: Jimmy最近有什么反常？他和Webb关系怎么样？
Has Jimmy been acting odd lately? How's his relationship with Webb?
Jimmy话少，我管账他管厨房。Webb挺信他，经常叫他进办公室谈半小时，关门只有两人。谈什么我不知道，这行别多嘴。
Jimmy's quiet, I handle accounts, he handles the kitchen. Webb trusted him, often called him in for half-hour private talks. What they discussed, I don't know—rule of the trade.
你眼睛没闭上吧？看到什么了？
Your eyes weren't closed, were they? What did you see?
前天看到<special=1>Jimmy从Webb办公室抱出一个陶土水壶</special>，旧旧的像古董，土黄色有裂纹。
The other day I saw <special=1>Jimmy carrying a clay water jug out of Webb's office</special>, old and antique-looking, earthy yellow with cracks.

testimony: Tommy看到Jimmy从Webb办公室抱出一个疑似古董的陶土水壶
Tommy saw Jimmy carrying what appeared to be an antique clay water jug out of Webb's office

words: 然后呢？
Then what?
他往厨房走。我正想问，他一看到我就把壶藏到身后，挤出一个很僵的笑，然后就溜了...我从没见他那么慌张。
He headed to the kitchen. I was about to ask, but when he saw me, he hid the jug behind his back, forced a very stiff smile, then slipped away... I've never seen him that panicked.
聊聊Vivian。大家说她是Webb赚钱的工具，你怎么看？
Let's talk about Vivian. Everyone says she's Webb's money-making tool. What do you think?
她现在状态怎么样？
How is she doing now?
她的班是我排的，Webb的生意我不方便评论。她本该是个好姑娘，可世道没给她选择。
I schedule her shifts, can't comment on Webb's business. She should have been a good girl, but the world didn't give her a choice.
最近Vivian绷不住了，<special=1>取消了好几场VIP包厢会客</special>，说身体不好，但我看是心里撑不住了。
Lately Vivian has been breaking down, <special=1>canceled several VIP private room appointments</special>, said she was unwell, but I think she just can't take it mentally.

testimony: Vivian最近取消了多场VIP包厢会客，Tommy认为她精神状态濒临崩溃
Vivian recently canceled multiple VIP private room appointments, Tommy believes she is on the verge of a mental breakdown

words: Jimmy最近有什么不对劲？
Has Jimmy been acting strange lately?
Webb有时让Jimmy送‘特殊的信’，回来后账上就多一笔现金。Jimmy最近看那些信封像看炸弹，但大家都需要钱。
Webb sometimes had Jimmy deliver 'special letters', cash would appear in the books after. Lately Jimmy looks at those envelopes like bombs, but everyone needs money.
前天那个陶土壶是怎么回事？
What about that clay jug the other day?
那天Jimmy很慌，壶不像Webb先生的收藏。他抱着壶脸煞白，我喊他他像见鬼一样跑了。那不仅是慌张，是恐惧——像手里捧着要命的东西。

Jimmy was panicked that day, the jug didn't look like Mr. Webb's collection. He held it pale-faced, ran like he saw a ghost when I called. It wasn't just panic—it was terror, like holding something lethal.
Webb和Vivian是什么关系？最近有什么变化？
What's the relationship between Webb and Vivian? Has anything changed recently?
最近2个月<special=1>Webb和一个叫Rita的女人走得很近</special>。Vivian看到过，没闹，但后来在化妆室哭着说‘我为他做了这么多’。
In the last two months, <special=1>Webb got close to a woman named Rita</special>. Vivian saw them together, didn't make a scene, but later cried in the dressing room saying 'I did so much for him.'

testimony: 最近2个月Webb和一个叫Rita的女人走得很近
In the last two months Webb got close to a woman named Rita

words: Rita是谁介绍来的？Webb知道她的身份吗？
Who introduced Rita? Did Webb know who she really was?
一个客人介绍的。我听到Webb在电话里说‘我知道她是谁派来的，我会配合演戏’，还说‘只要能保护重要的人’。
A guest introduced her. I overheard Webb on the phone: 'I know who sent her, I'll play along,' and 'as long as it protects the important person.'
老板死了，这店以后归谁？
Boss is dead, who takes over this place?
Webb交代过让我维持局面。<special=1>他早就立过遗嘱，英国有亲戚会来处理遗产</special>。这店不可能归我。
Webb told me to keep things running. <special=1>He already made a will, relatives in England will handle the estate</special>. This place can't be mine.

testimony: Webb早就立过遗嘱，英国有亲戚会来处理遗产
Webb already made a will, relatives in England will handle the estate

words: Morrison什么时候到的现场？
When did Morrison arrive at the scene?
<special=1>12点Morrison匆匆赶到</special>，那会儿我正准备离开。
<special=1>Morrison arrived in a rush at midnight</special>, just as I was preparing to leave.

testimony: Morrison在午夜12点到达现场
Morrison arrived at the scene at midnight

words: 他看起来怎么样？着急吗？
How did he look? Anxious?
着急？不，他显得胸有成竹，像早已背熟了台词的演员。
Anxious? No, he looked confident, like an actor who'd memorized his lines.
你和Webb是什么关系？不只是老板和员工吧？
What's your relationship with Webb? More than boss and employee?
我和Webb的关系不是随便能概括的。但这和凶手无关。
My relationship with Webb can't be easily summarized. But it has nothing to do with the killer.
当天酒吧有什么活动？
What event was held at the bar that day?
当晚有酒会，<special=1>我10点上台，11点10分最后一曲结束</special>，之后客人陆续离开。
There was a cocktail party, <special=1>I went on stage at 10, the last song ended at 11:10</special>, then guests started leaving.

testimony: Vivian从10点到11点10分在舞台上表演
Vivian performed on stage from 10:00 to 11:10

words: 酒吧什么时候结束营业？
When does the bar close?
每晚都有演出和酒会。下次您可以早点来，Brennan先生。
Every night there are shows and parties. Next time come earlier, Mr. Brennan.
他对你很重要，对吗？
He was important to you, wasn't he?
<special=1>我和Webb是3年秘密恋人</special>，我深爱他。
<special=1>Webb and I were secret lovers for three years</special>, I deeply loved him.

testimony: Vivian承认与Webb是3年秘密恋人，声称深爱他
Vivian admits to being Webb's secret lover for three years, claims she deeply loved him

words: Jimmy那天有什么反常？
Did Jimmy act unusually that day?
反常？那个平日像隐形人的家伙突然大吼大叫——是的，我听到了争吵。
Unusual? The man who's usually invisible suddenly screaming his head off—yes, I heard an argument.
隔着门能确定是他吗？
Can you be sure it was him through the door?
隔着门听不清是谁。但门开了，<special=1>Jimmy和另一个人脸色都很难看</special>，一前一后像逃命似地走了。
Couldn't tell who through the door. But when it opened, <special=1>Jimmy and another person both looked terrible</special>, they left one after another as if fleeing.

testimony: Vivian目睹Jimmy和另一人争吵后离开，两人脸色都很难看
Vivian witnessed Jimmy and another person leave after an argument, both looking very distressed

words: Tommy这个人怎么样？有什么奇怪的？
What's Tommy like? Anything odd about him?
那只耗子？有家室的正经老头，看我一眼都要脸红半天。
That mouse? A decent old man with a family. Blushes for half a day just looking at me.
他有什么特别的举动？
Has he done anything notable?
他问过我要不要离开这里。不过他是个听话的人，<special=1>帮我送东西传话从不拒绝</special>。
He once asked if I wanted to leave. But he's obedient, <special=1>never refuses when I ask him to deliver things or pass messages</special>.

testimony: Tommy经常帮Vivian送东西传话，从不拒绝
Tommy often helps Vivian deliver things and pass messages, never refuses

words: 什么样的小忙？
What kind of favors?
送个东西，传个话。你不会以为我让他杀人吧？
Deliver something, pass a message. You don't think I asked him to kill someone, do you?
这么早就在排练了？
Rehearsing so early?
不管我在台下是什么身份，站在舞台上我就只是个歌手。唱歌是我这辈子唯一的梦想。
No matter who I am offstage, on this stage I'm just a singer. Singing is the only dream I've ever had.
你觉得谁是凶手？
Who do you think is the killer?
谁知道呢？也许是仇家，也许是某个被他伤透了心的人。反正人都死了，比起抓凶手，我更在乎今晚的灯光。
Who knows? Maybe an enemy, maybe someone he broke. He's dead anyway. I care more about tonight's lighting than catching the killer.
昨晚派对是在这办的？
Was the party held here last night?
是的。不过<special=1>Webb出事时客人已经走光了，只剩下员工</special>。
Yes. But <special=1>when Webb died, the guests were already gone—only staff remained</special>.

testimony: Webb出事时派对客人已全部离开，只剩下员工
When Webb died, all party guests had already left, only staff remained

words: 那天晚上去Webb会客室，发生了什么？
What happened when you went to Webb's parlor that night?
<special=1>大约23:05去Webb会客室敲门，有人喊‘别打扰我’</special>，没听清是谁。之后一直待在化妆室。
<special=1>Around 11:05 PM I went to Webb's parlor and knocked, someone shouted 'Don't disturb me'</special>, couldn't tell who. After that I stayed in the dressing room.

testimony: Vivian约23:05去Webb会客室，门紧闭，敲门后有人喊'别打扰我'但没听清是谁
Vivian went to Webb's parlor around 11:05 PM, door was closed, heard someone shout 'Don't disturb me' after knocking but couldn't tell who

words: 11点半那声枪响，你听到了吗？
Did you hear that gunshot at 11:30?
听到了，但以为是帮派闹事。这附近三天两头就有枪声，谁会当回事。
I heard it, but thought it was gang trouble. Gunshots happen around here all the time, who would care.
你当时没觉得异常？没看到任何人？
Didn't you think it was unusual? Didn't see anyone?
没有。从Webb门口回来后心情不好，在化妆室补妆，没看到任何人。
No. After coming back from Webb's door I was in a bad mood, fixing makeup in the dressing room, didn't see anyone.
你好，我是Brennan，在调查Webb先生的案子。你是这里的厨师？
Hello, I'm Brennan, investigating the Webb case. Are you the cook here?
我叫Jimmy，<special=1>蓝月亮的主厨</special>。Webb先生的事我听说了。
I'm Jimmy, <special=1>head chef at Blue Moon</special>. I've heard about Mr. Webb.

testimony: Jimmy是蓝月亮的主厨
Jimmy is the head chef at Blue Moon

words: 昨天直到很晚都没看见你。你去哪了？
I didn't see you until late yesterday. Where were you?
白天在家照顾妻子Anna。<special=1>晚上9点到蓝月亮上夜班</special>，Tommy帮我调的班。
Was home caring for my wife Anna during the day. <special=1>Arrived at Blue Moon at 9 PM for the night shift</special>, Tommy arranged the schedule change.

testimony: Jimmy当天只上夜班，约晚上9点到达蓝月亮
Jimmy only worked the night shift that day, arrived at Blue Moon around 9pm

words: 案发时间11点半左右，你具体在哪？
Around 11:30 when it happened, where exactly were you?
<special=1>从11点10分到快12点一直在厨房</special>，帮厨Tom和洗碗工可作证。打烊前最忙，厨房太吵什么都没听到。
<special=1>In the kitchen from 11:10 until nearly midnight</special>, helper Tom and dishwashers can vouch. Busiest time before closing, kitchen too noisy to hear anything.

testimony: Jimmy声称23:10到近0:00一直在厨房工作，帮厨Tom和洗碗工可作证
Jimmy claims he was in the kitchen from 11:10pm to nearly midnight, helper Tom and dishwashers can vouch

words: Webb搞勒索生意。你有参与过吗？
Webb ran extortion schemes. Were you ever involved?
不...Webb先生是好老板，薪水高也尊重人。我从不参与那些事。
No... Mr. Webb was a good boss. Good pay, respectful. I was never involved in any of that.
即便你是非法移民？你是什么样的员工？
Even though you're an illegal immigrant? What kind of employee are you?
是，Webb先生知道但从没刁难。我努力工作守规矩，<special=1>从没干过坏事</special>。
Yes, Mr. Webb knew but never made trouble. I work hard and follow rules, <special=1>never done anything bad</special>.

testimony: Jimmy声称自己从没干过坏事
Jimmy claims he has never done anything bad

words: 你也知道Webb惹了不该惹的人，为什么还留在他身边？
You know Webb crossed the wrong people. Why stay with him?
我需要这份工作。Anna快生了，医药费、房租...我不能失业。
I need this job. Anna is about to give birth, medical bills, rent... I can't afford to lose my job.
上次说到那个陶壶。你在这干了多久？为什么偏偏在Webb死前动手？
About that jug. How long have you worked here? Why steal right before Webb died?
3年都没动手，偏偏Webb死前几天。你提前知道他要死？
Three years and you never touched anything. Did you know he was going to die?
3年零4个月。那天实在撑不住了，Anna催着要钱，医院要先交押金...不是我选的时机，是走投无路了。
Three years and four months. I just couldn't hold on anymore that day. Anna needed money, the hospital demanded a deposit... I didn't choose the timing, I was desperate.
我怎么可能知道！Webb先生给我工作、给我活路。<special=1>我承认偷了东西，但我不是杀人犯</special>...我只是个厨子。
How could I possibly know! Mr. Webb gave me a job, a way to live. <special=1>I admit I stole, but I'm not a murderer</special>... I'm just a cook.

testimony: Jimmy承认偷窃但否认杀人
Jimmy admits to theft but denies murder

words: Webb为什么要用你？一个厨子，帮他打理勒索生意？
Why would Webb use you? A cook, running his extortion business?
Webb没解释过。有时候让我<special=1>帮他送东西、收钱，充当跑腿</special>，大概是看我嘴紧手脚快。
Webb never explained. Sometimes had me <special=1>deliver things, collect money, run errands for him</special>, probably because I keep quiet and work fast.

testimony: Jimmy帮Webb送东西、收钱，充当跑腿
Jimmy delivered things and collected money for Webb, acting as his errand man

words: 你是个聪明人。来这之前是做什么的？
You're a smart guy. What did you do before this?
以前是好学生，家里不让念了。在这里脏、累，但能攒钱。我只想<special=1>攒够钱拿到公民身份</special>。
Used to be a good student, family wouldn't let me continue. It's dirty and hard here, but I can save. I just want to <special=1>save enough to get citizenship</special>.

testimony: Jimmy想攒够钱获得公民身份
Jimmy wants to save enough money to obtain citizenship

words: Emma转述法医处的初步尸检信息。
Emma relays preliminary autopsy information from the coroner.
Zack，法医那边传来消息了。<special=1>尸检报告需要明天才能完成</special>，<special=2>尸体烧得太严重，目前连性别都无法确定</special>。
Zack, word from the coroner. <special=1>The autopsy report won't be ready until tomorrow</special>, <special=2>the body is too severely burned, they can't even determine gender yet</special>.

testimony: 尸检报告需要明天才能完成，尸体烧得太严重，目前连性别都无法确定
The autopsy report won't be ready until tomorrow, the body is too severely burned, they can't even determine gender yet

words: Emma转述Foster法医的初步鉴定结论：<special=1>起火点在一楼店面，地下室反而烧损较轻</special>，<special=2>呈现典型人为纵火特征</special>。
Emma relays Coroner Foster's preliminary finding: <special=1>the fire started on the first floor, the basement suffered less damage</special>, <special=2>showing typical signs of arson</special>.

testimony: Foster法医初步判断起火点在一楼店面，地下室反而烧损较轻，呈现典型人为纵火特征
Coroner Foster's preliminary finding is that the fire started on the first floor, the basement suffered less damage, showing typical signs of arson

words: Emma谈及自己的家庭背景和对案件的感触。
Emma discusses her family background and feelings about the case.
Zack，这个案子让我想起了我自己的家。<special=1>1912年的港口事故夺走了我父亲的命</special>，<special=2>那些资本家到现在还在用同样的手段欺压穷人</special>。

Zack, this case reminds me of my own family. <special=1>The 1912 port accident took my father's life</special>, <special=2>and those capitalists are still using the same tactics to exploit the poor</special>.

testimony: 1912年的港口事故夺走了我父亲的命，那些资本家到现在还在用同样的手段欺压穷人
The 1912 port accident took my father's life, and those capitalists are still using the same tactics to exploit the poor

words: Morrison声称死者就是Margaret，并以"专业权威"压制Zack的质疑。
Morrison claims the victim is Margaret and uses his 'professional authority' to suppress Zack's doubts.
Brennan……我很遗憾。<special=1>死者应该就是Margaret</special>。我是第一响应警官，我当然有初步的调查信息。
Brennan... I'm sorry. <special=1>The victim should be Margaret</special>. I'm the first responding officer, of course I have preliminary investigation information.

testimony: 死者应该就是Margaret，我基于现场情况做出的判断
The victim should be Margaret, I made this judgment based on the scene

words: <special=1>我叫Morrison，芝加哥南区警探，干了十五年了</special>。<special=2>我是第一个到现场的警官</special>。<special=1>案发当晚九点我接到报警电话，九点十五分到达鞋坊现场</special>，火已经快灭了。

<special=1>I'm Morrison, South Chicago detective for fifteen years</special>. <special=2>I was the first officer on scene</special>. <special=1>I got the call at 9 PM that night, arrived at the shoe shop at 9:15 PM</special>, the fire was almost out.

testimony: 我叫Morrison，芝加哥南区警探，干了十五年了，是第一个到现场的警官
I'm Morrison, South Chicago detective for fifteen years, I was the first officer on scene
案发当晚九点我接到报警电话，九点十五分到达鞋坊现场，火已经快灭了
I got the call at 9 PM that night, arrived at the shoe shop at 9:15 PM, the fire was almost out

words: Morrison不耐烦地提到南区治安现状。<special=1>南区最近案件频发</special>，<special=2>都是些阴沟里的穷人闹出来的事儿，谁有心思一个个查那么仔细呢</special>。

Morrison impatiently mentions the current state of the South Side. <special=1>Cases have been piling up in the South Side lately</special>, <special=2>all petty troubles from gutter-poor folks, who has the time to look into each one carefully</special>.

testimony: 南区最近案件频发，都是些阴沟里的穷人闹出来的事儿，谁有心思一个个查那么仔细呢
Cases have been piling up in the South Side lately, all petty troubles from gutter-poor folks, who has the time to look into each one carefully

words: Leonard否认认识Vinnie，声称与Frank只是正常借贷关系。
Leonard denies knowing Vinnie, claims his relationship with Frank was just normal lending.
Vinnie Moretti？<special=1>我不认识这个人</special>。Frank Kowalski？是的，他是我们的客户。Frank因赌博欠钱，我们是正常催款。
Vinnie Moretti? <special=1>I don't know this person</special>. Frank Kowalski? Yes, he was our client. Frank owed money from gambling, we were just collecting normally.

testimony: 我不认识Vinnie Moretti，Frank因赌博欠钱，我们是正常催款
I don't know Vinnie Moretti, Frank owed money from gambling, we were just collecting normally

words: 根据Moore银行入职档案记录：<special=1>Leonard原名Russo，1915年左右改名为Ross</special>。
According to Moore Bank employment records: <special=1>Leonard's original name was Russo, changed to Ross around 1915</special>.

testimony: Leonard原名Russo，1915年左右改名为Ross，来源Moore银行入职档案
Leonard's original name was Russo, changed to Ross around 1915, from Moore Bank employment records

words: <special=1>我在Moore银行工作十年了</special>，<special=2>负责南区的贷款催收业务</special>。这有什么问题吗？
<special=1>I've been working at Moore Bank for ten years</special>, <special=2>handling loan collection in the South Side</special>. Is there a problem with that?

testimony: 我在Moore银行工作十年了，负责南区的贷款催收业务
I've been working at Moore Bank for ten years, handling loan collection in the South Side

words: Leonard（循环6）否认案发当晚去过鞋坊。
Leonard (Loop 6) denies going to the shoe shop on the night of the incident.
<special=1>那天晚上我整晚在家</special>，从没去过鞋坊。就算现场有眼镜碎片，也不能证明是我的。我只是个银行职员，和这件事没有任何关系。

<special=1>I was home all night</special>, never went to the shoe shop. Even if there are eyeglass fragments at the scene, it doesn't prove they're mine. I'm just a bank clerk, I have nothing to do with this.

testimony: 那天晚上我整晚在家，从没去过鞋坊
I was home all night, never went to the shoe shop

words: Vinnie否认近期去过Frank住处。
Vinnie denies going to Frank's place recently.
Frank Kowalski？我知道这个名字。但是<special=1>我最近2、3个月没去过他那儿</special>。你问错人了，侦探。
Frank Kowalski? I know the name. But <special=1>I haven't been near his place for two or three months</special>. You're asking the wrong person, detective.

testimony: 我最近2、3个月没去过Frank那儿
I haven't been near Frank's place for two or three months

words: 等等……这张照片上的人——<special=1>Vinnie看到Leonard照片时口误说出Russo而非Ross</special>。
Wait... the man in this photo — <special=1>when Vinnie saw Leonard's photo, he accidentally said 'Russo' instead of 'Ross'</special>.

testimony: Vinnie看到Leonard照片时口误说出Russo而非Ross
When Vinnie saw Leonard's photo, he accidentally said 'Russo' instead of 'Ross'

words: 好吧……我不装了。<special=1>11月6日晚上八点半我去鞋坊找Frank催债</special>，我们吵起来了，<special=2>我一怒之下杀了他，然后放火烧了现场</special>。

Fine... I'll stop pretending. <special=1>On the evening of November 6th at 8:30 PM I went to the shoe shop to collect Frank's debt</special>, we argued, <special=2>I killed him in a rage, then set fire to the scene</special>.

testimony: 11月6日晚上八点半我去鞋坊找Frank催债，我们吵起来了，我一怒之下杀了他，然后放火烧了现场
On the evening of November 6th at 8:30 PM I went to the shoe shop to collect Frank's debt, we argued, I killed him in a rage, then set fire to the scene

words: Moore声称贷款合法，Frank亲签，条款合理。
Moore claims the loan is legal, Frank signed personally, terms are reasonable.
<special=1>Frank亲自签字借了$3,200</special>。我们的协议条款完全符合法律规定。Brennan，你去告我。你拿着这些证据去法院，法官会告诉你'Moore先生没有违法'。

<special=1>Frank personally signed for $3,200</special>. Our agreement terms fully comply with legal requirements. Brennan, go ahead and sue me. Take this evidence to court, the judge will tell you 'Mr. Moore has not broken any law'.

testimony: Frank亲自签字借了$3,200贷款，协议条款完全合法
Frank personally signed the $3,200 loan, the agreement terms are completely legal

words: 仔细查看贷款协议的抬头——<special=1>协议抬头不是Moore Bank Loan Agreement，而是Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement</special>。
Looking closely at the loan agreement header — <special=1>the header is not 'Moore Bank Loan Agreement' but 'Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement'</special>.

testimony: 协议抬头不是Moore Bank Loan Agreement而是Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement
The agreement header is not 'Moore Bank Loan Agreement' but 'Moore Investment Company Investment Agreement'

words: <special=1>Leonard是我最得力的催收员</special>，<special=2>南区的贷款业务基本都是他在跑</special>。我信任他的工作能力。
<special=1>Leonard is my best debt collector</special>, <special=2>he handles almost all the loan business in the South Side</special>. I trust his competence.

testimony: Leonard是我最得力的催收员，南区的贷款业务基本都是他在跑
Leonard is my best debt collector, he handles almost all the loan business in the South Side

words: Danny诬陷Rose是骗子，声称她最近才勾引Frank。
Danny accuses Rose of being a con artist, claims she only recently seduced Frank.
我叔叔Frank一直是个正直的人，直到<special=1>最近那个墨西哥女人出现</special>。Rose Martinez最近才勾引我叔叔，他老了判断力不行了。她骗他贷款$3,200，还想拿走遗产！

My uncle Frank was always an upright man, until <special=1>that Mexican woman showed up recently</special>. Rose Martinez recently seduced my uncle, he's old and his judgment is impaired. She tricked him into a $3,200 loan and wants the inheritance!

testimony: 那个墨西哥女人最近才勾引我叔叔，她骗了他贷款还想要遗产
That Mexican woman recently seduced my uncle, she tricked him into a loan and wants the inheritance

words: <special=1>我叫Danny Kowalski，Frank是我叔叔</special>，我一直住在他家里，帮他打理日常。<special=2>11月6日晚上我在赌场待到快九点</special>，回家路上看到鞋坊那边有烟，但我没过去。

<special=1>I'm Danny Kowalski, Frank is my uncle</special>, I've been living at his place and helping with daily affairs. <special=2>On the evening of November 6th I was at the casino until almost 9</special>, saw smoke near the shoe shop on the way home but I didn't go over.

testimony: 我叫Danny Kowalski，Frank是我叔叔，我一直住在他家里，帮他打理日常
I'm Danny Kowalski, Frank is my uncle, I've been living at his place and helping with daily affairs
11月6日晚上我在赌场待到快九点，回家路上看到鞋坊那边有烟，但我没过去
On the evening of November 6th I was at the casino until almost 9, saw smoke near the shoe shop on the way home but I didn't go over

words: 我叔叔人好心软，<special=1>最初只借了600美元修房子，后来不知道怎么就涨成了3200</special>。还有，<special=2>叔叔跟O'Malley家是老邻居，1912年港口事故的时候在同一个工区</special>。

My uncle was too kind-hearted, <special=1>originally only borrowed $600 to fix the house, somehow it ballooned to $3,200</special>. Also, <special=2>uncle was old neighbors with the O'Malleys, they worked in the same section during the 1912 port accident</special>.

testimony: 叔叔最初只借了600美元修房子，后来不知道怎么就涨成了3200
Uncle originally only borrowed $600 to fix the house, somehow it ballooned to $3,200
叔叔跟O'Malley家是老邻居，1912年港口事故的时候在同一个工区
Uncle was old neighbors with the O'Malleys, they worked in the same section during the 1912 port accident

words: Rose讲述与Frank的5年恋情以及贷款的真实用途。
Rose describes her five-year love affair with Frank and the real purpose of the loan.
<special=1>我和Frank相识五年了</special>，<special=2>从1920年开始</special>。他是个善良的人，我们因为社会偏见只能秘密约会。<special=2>我曾劝Frank别贷款</special>，但他坚持要修好Margaret的地下室。

<special=1>Frank and I have known each other for five years</special>, <special=2>since 1920</special>. He's a kind man, we could only date secretly because of social prejudice. <special=2>I tried to talk Frank out of the loan</special>, but he insisted on repairing Margaret's basement.

testimony: 我和Frank相识五年了，从1920年开始
Frank and I have known each other for five years, since 1920
我曾劝Frank别贷款，但他坚持要修好Margaret的地下室
I tried to talk Frank out of the loan, but he insisted on repairing Margaret's basement

words: <special=1>我愿意按照Frank的意愿将房产捐给工人互助会</special>。我不要他的房子。我只想要他活着。
<special=1>I'm willing to donate the property to the Workers' Mutual Aid Society as Frank wished</special>. I don't want his house. I just want him alive.

testimony: 我愿意按照Frank的意愿将房产捐给工人互助会
I'm willing to donate the property to the Workers' Mutual Aid Society as Frank wished

words: Rose提供案发当晚的目击证词。
Rose provides eyewitness testimony from the night of the incident.
那天晚上...我在窗户边等Frank。<special=1>大约8点20分，我看到一个戴眼镜的西装男从鞋坊匆匆离开</special>。后来，<special=2>9点多的时候，我看到Vinnie从鞋坊出来，手里拿着打火机</special>。然后...然后火就烧起来了...

That night... I was waiting for Frank by the window. <special=1>Around 8:20 PM, I saw a bespectacled man in a suit leaving the shoe shop hurriedly</special>. Later, <special=2>after 9 PM, I saw Vinnie coming out of the shoe shop, holding a lighter</special>. Then... then the fire started...

testimony: 11月6日晚上8点20分左右，看到一个戴眼镜的西装男从鞋坊匆匆离开
Around 8:20 PM on November 6th, I saw a bespectacled man in a suit leaving the shoe shop in a hurry
11月6日晚上9点多，看到Vinnie从鞋坊出来，手里拿着打火机
After 9 PM on November 6th, I saw Vinnie coming out of the shoe shop, holding a lighter

words: Rose回忆与Frank相识的经过以及Frank近期的精神状态。
Rose recalls how she met Frank and his recent mental state.
<special=1>我和Frank在1920年Mercy Hospital认识的</special>，<special=2>他因港口旧伤住院，我是那里的护士</special>。最近他……<special=1>Frank最近总是很焦虑，晚上经常一个人坐着发呆</special>，<special=2>但他不肯告诉我原因</special>。

<special=1>Frank and I met at Mercy Hospital in 1920</special>, <special=2>he was hospitalized for old port injuries, I was a nurse there</special>. Lately he... <special=1>Frank has been very anxious recently, often sitting alone in a daze at night</special>, <special=2>but he won't tell me why</special>.

testimony: 我和Frank在1920年Mercy Hospital认识的，他因港口旧伤住院，我是那里的护士
Frank and I met at Mercy Hospital in 1920, he was hospitalized for old port injuries, I was a nurse there
Frank最近总是很焦虑，晚上经常一个人坐着发呆，但他不肯告诉我原因
Frank has been very anxious lately, often sitting alone in a daze at night, but he won't tell me why

words: O'Hara讲述银行催款和意大利人上门威胁的经历。
O'Hara describes the bank's debt collection and an Italian man coming to threaten her.
<special=1>银行的人来催款，还派了一个意大利人来威胁我</special>。那个人很凶，说如果不还钱就让我好看。我丈夫的工厂倒闭了，我们真的还不上...

<special=1>The bank people came to collect, and even sent an Italian man to threaten me</special>. That man was fierce, said he'd make me pay if I didn't repay. My husband's factory went bankrupt, we really can't pay...

testimony: 银行的人来催款，还派了一个意大利人来威胁我
The bank people came to collect the debt, and even sent an Italian man to threaten me

words: O'Hara回忆Frank的身体状况和过去的经历。
O'Hara recalls Frank's physical condition and past experiences.
你们不知道吧，Frank很早以前就受过伤。<special=1>Frank在1912年港口事故中受过重伤</special>，<special=2>腿脚一直不太方便</special>。

You probably don't know, Frank was injured a long time ago. <special=1>Frank was seriously injured in the 1912 port accident</special>, <special=2>his legs have never been quite right since</special>.

testimony: Frank在1912年港口事故中受过重伤，腿脚一直不太方便
Frank was seriously injured in the 1912 port accident, his legs have never been quite right since

words: O'Hara提到Frank最近的异常行为。
O'Hara mentions Frank's recent unusual behavior.
Frank最近怪怪的。他<special=1>一直在整理一些银行相关的文件</special>，<special=2>说要去举报他们</special>。我劝他小心，但他不听……

Frank has been acting strange lately. He's been <special=1>sorting through some bank-related documents</special>, <special=2>says he's going to report them</special>. I told him to be careful, but he wouldn't listen...

testimony: Frank最近在整理一些银行相关的文件，说要去举报他们
Frank has been sorting through some bank-related documents recently, says he's going to report them

words: Tony讲述Vinnie在Silver Moon酒吧的行为。
Tony describes Vinnie's behavior at the Silver Moon bar.
Vinnie？他是这儿的常客。<special=1>每次来都说'今天又赚了一笔'</special>，出手阔绰，从不赊账。不像是欠钱还债的人。
Vinnie? He's a regular here. <special=1>Every time he comes he says 'Made another buck today'</special>, spends generously, never runs a tab. Doesn't seem like someone repaying debt.

testimony: Vinnie每次来Silver Moon酒吧都说'今天又赚了一笔'，不像是还债的样子
Every time Vinnie comes to Silver Moon bar he says 'Made another buck today', doesn't sound like someone repaying debt

words: Tony谈及南区老住户的近况。
Tony discusses the situation of longtime South Side residents.
这条街变了……<special=1>南区好几家老住户最近都被逼搬走了</special>，<special=2>都是欠了Moore银行的钱</special>。大家都不敢吭声。
This street has changed... <special=1>Several longtime South Side residents have been forced out recently</special>, <special=2>all owed money to Moore Bank</special>. Nobody dares to speak up.

testimony: 南区好几家老住户最近都被逼搬走了，都是欠了Moore银行的钱
Several longtime South Side residents have been forced out recently, all owed money to Moore Bank
Emma 确认 Webb 邀请 Zack 参加舞会，Zack 被酒保拒门
Emma 表示若不知真相绝不写报道
Emma 分析：Webb 紧急雇佣侦探不寻常，合同有保险倾向
Emma 关键疑点：Webb 真正怀疑的凶手是谁？（核心悬念）
Emma：两人进入酒吧，开始调查——确认 loop2 调查目标
Emma：如果 Webb 预感到自己会死，他怀疑的人一定在酒吧里
Emma：Webb 是做勒索生意的，但谁是现在的执行人——这才是关键
Emma：Rosa 的时间线说法一直没能反驳，下一步要重新检查案发现场
Emma：现在要找的是案发现场内的疑点，验证 Rosa 的时间线说法
Emma：如果 Rosa 是在撒谎，案发现场应该有没有被发现的证据
Emma：时间线谜题已解锁——23:30 是假枪声，真实案发时间更早
Emma：说服 Vivian 不认罪是 loop4 的核心目标，弹壳可能是关键突破口
Emma：loop4 的核心任务是救 Vivian，不是审讯她——她的谎言是自毁，不是恶意
Emma：先去搞清楚弹壳的型号，这是说服 Vivian 的关键突破口
Emma：Morrison 对 .45 弹壳的反应不正常——他认出了那个弹壳背后的东西
Emma：下一步：找到真正的凶器，然后击破 Morrison——这是 loop5-6 的核心目标
Emma：Morrison 的反应不是普通警官面对证据的反应——他在保护什么
Emma：四大疑点梳理——'Don't be bothering me!'那个声音不是 Webb；合同字迹和纸条字迹相同，写这些东西的人就是凶手
Emma：对 Zack 选择"没有酬劳也要查下去"的态度十分欣赏——此刻正式把 Zack 当作并肩搭档
Emma：你是一个理想主义者，Zack——你跟我说的不一样，但我们其实是一路人（搭档关系确立）
Emma：下一步：带着真正的凶器（8507）和 Jimmy 给 Whale 的回信（8502），去警局击破 Morrison，当众释放 Vivian
Emma：在那之前，我们需要先进 Morrison 的家——用我的记者身份，你做我的助理，去取回那枚弹壳（loop6 行动前置）
Emma：Morrison 夺走弹壳不是要销毁它——他是要藏起来，因为那枚弹壳也是对他的威胁
Emma：我们要单独进他办公室、把所有证据一件一件摆到他眼前——在只有他和我们三个人的空间里，他没有表演对象，也没有同僚给他台阶
Rosa 谎言1——Vivian 此刻手里正拿着一把手枪，她一定是刚刚杀了 Webb
Rosa 谎言2——23:30 枪响，当晚无其他枪响，当时只有 Vivian 在里面，所以只能是她杀的
Rosa——大家都听到了 23:30 的枪响，当晚无其他枪响，只有 Vivian 在里面，一定是她杀的
Rosa——当晚 23:20，自己去外面丢过一次垃圾（关键时间节点证言）
Morrison 宣告：Webb 死亡，Vivian 为主要嫌疑人
Morrison 宣告：准备逮捕 Vivian
Morrison（指证后）：因 Zack 揭穿 Rosa + 委托协议书，同意给 72 小时
Morrison 口述：现场勘验完成，会客室现在开放
Morrison 口述：子弹缺失——现场没有找到子弹（不解释原因）
Morrison 口述：尸体伤口状况（枪伤位置、大致口径特征等描述性信息）
Morrison 宣告——Vivian 有杀人动机和计划，她的手枪就是真正的凶器
Morrison 行动记录：拿走 8103（委托协议书），夺走 8308（弹壳），宣布逮捕 Vivian
Morrison（阶段 A）：Vivian 案件的官方立场——她有动机，案件已经很清楚了
Morrison：Vivian 的手枪就是凶器！凶手就是 Vivian！（第一轮谎言，Expose 起点）
Morrison：我只是临时接警，搜查失误，不需要立刻释放嫌疑人——我后续可以重新调查
Morrison：Whale 只是个放贷的，和本案真凶没有任何关系
Tommy——酒吧只做了私酒生意，没有干别的（谎言1，Expose round_1 由 Vivian 证言 8062002 击破）
Tommy——23:30 枪声来自厨房和会客室所在的酒吧南方
Tommy——还有古董买卖，花瓶卖给 Thompson、油画卖给 Coleman，都已卖出（谎言3，Expose round_3 由 8209+8210 击破）
Tommy——自己只是按 Webb 指示记账，不参与具体业务（谎言4，Expose round_4 由 8207 击破）
Tommy——你有证据吗，一个歌女的话算什么，酒吧里的账目都是清清白白的（谎言2，Expose round_2 由 8205+8206 击破；Expose 中新产生）
Tommy 暗示 Webb 惹上了大人物（loop2 Expose 结束后自然流露，非单独证词；指向 Whale 类型的大人物，是疑点 8203 解锁 condition）
Tommy：这枚弹壳是 .45 ACP 警用弹——这个批次的枪我见过
Tommy：Webb 让我去收勒索时被人打了一枪（只打大腿），那是 Whale 的警告；那次之后就由别人接手了（不点名）
Tommy 正式指认：'Webb 勒索过很多像 Whale 这样的人……但如此难以对付的，他还是头一个。连这间酒吧，也被他派来的人渗透了。'；Zack 追问'是谁'，Tommy：'是 Rita。'（基于经验的明确指认，非单纯主观猜测）
Tommy：这枚弹壳（.45 ACP）和被 Morrison 夺走的那枚是同批次——这是 Whale 那边用的枪打出来的
Tommy：我特意留了一份鼓点单子的备份——23:00 的鼓点高潮，整个大厅都听不见别的声音
Tommy：那次之后 Webb 改让别人接手收款了，那个人我知道他是谁，但今天我还不能说（隐瞒话题，loop5 Expose 后点名）
Vivian 酒后迷糊：半醉失神，面对追问茫然无法作答；偶尔喃喃自语却没说完整
Vivian——我对他十分憎恨，是我杀了 Webb
Vivian——因为 Webb 一直让她去勒索别人，她恨他
Vivian——平时都会在 23:30 给 Webb 送酒
Vivian 动摇：听到 Webb 要她继承遗产的消息后，沉默，说要再想想
Vivian（坚持认罪）——我确实杀了 Webb，不用替我辩护
Vivian——《芝加哥狂想曲》的鼓点很强，是 Webb 最喜欢的一首曲子；我当时希望他能听到，和我最后共舞一曲，可他没开门，没听到（⭐ loop5 时间线伏笔）
Vivian——关于 Rita 的态度：她让 Webb 变了，我已经无所谓了（内有对真相的迷惑）
Vivian：保险箱的密码是那一天——我们在那家咖啡馆，Webb 说他要记住这个日期
Vivian：他把这叠文件交给我，说如果他出了事，交给真正能用到它的人——他知道自己会死
Jimmy：他是兼职主厨，还有很多副业
Jimmy：对 Webb 的死深感抱歉（语气愧疚但不解释原因）
Jimmy：自己很缺钱，副业多是为了补贴家用
Jimmy：自己只是一个兼职主厨，和勒索的事没有关系
Jimmy（紧张掩饰）：销毁单子是工作需要，没什么特别的
Jimmy（口音暴露现场记录）：脱口说出"Don't be bothering me!"句式——爱尔兰裔 Hiberno-English 特有表达
Jimmy 在询问当晚行动时声称自己一直在厨房——隐瞒实际在 23:00 时进入了会客室
Anna：我们的孩子快出生了，家里需要一大笔钱——医院不便宜，爱尔兰人在这座城市不容易
Anna：Jimmy 说接了一件重要的差事，完成了就能解决我们的问题，我信他
Anna：他说……'帮我照顾她'。那是他最后说的话——不是说爱我，但我知道他的意思
